parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, phase: 'start', totalRows: $('Build Meta').first().json.totalRows, rowChunkSize: $('Build Meta').first().json.rowChunkSize } }}

parameters.url: ={{ (function(){ var b=$('Webhook').first().json.body||{}; var off=parseInt(b.rowOffset,10)||0; var lim=parseInt(b.rowLimit,10)||2000; var s=2+off; var e=1+off+lim; var fid=JSON.parse($('Redis GET meta').first().json.meta).file_id; var range='Base_Histórica_de_Vendas!A'+s+':AZ'+e; return 'https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/'+fid+'/values/'+encodeURIComponent(range); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, phase: 'chunk', processedRows: $('Process Chunk').first().json.processedRows, nextOffset: $('Process Chunk').first().json.nextOffset, hasMore: $('Process Chunk').first().json.hasMore, totalRows: $('Process Chunk').first().json.totalRows } }}
